use_cases: Displaying threaded discussion or comment sections in applications
Creating expandable Q&A sections with nested replies
Building forum-style conversation threads with visual hierarchy
Implementing collapsible discussion panels in documentation sites
Adding interactive discussion components to community platforms
ai_summary: A set of atomic React components for building discussion threads with accordion-style expandable replies. Features a vertical gradient border accent, animated chevron indicator, and clean typography hierarchy using Radix UI primitives. Designed for minimalist interfaces requiring collapsible discussion or comment functionality.
